description: Script excerpt with stage directions mixed into dialogue, including keepable and removable cues
source_text:
Detective Reeves: I've been waiting for you. (checks watch) Over an hour.
Clara: (enters, sets her coat down) I had to be careful. Someone followed me from the station.
Detective Reeves: (whispers) Did they see you come in here?
Clara: I don't think so. (pauses) But I can't be certain.
Detective Reeves: Then we don't have much time. Tell me what you found.
Clara: (shrugs) Nothing conclusive. Just fragments.
Detective Reeves: Fragments can be enough.
Clara: (leans forward, voice low) Not if the judge throws them out on procedural grounds.
Detective Reeves: (sighs heavily) Then we play it differently.

lines.speaker: Detective Reeves
